snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - the cure (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"the cure" out now: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/thecure
Shop "the cure" on 7" vinyl and cassette featuring an exclusive bonus song called "never do" that's not on the album: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store
Presave 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' out on June 12th: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove
Shop the collection: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store
Follow Olivia Rodrigo:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo
Twitter: https://x.com/oliviarodrigo
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy3zgWom-5AGypGX_FVTKpg
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/

Lyrics:
All the pretty girls in the foreground of my mind
I thought I’d done enough, but they keep moving the line
I thought I found the antidote this time
I thought I found the antidote this time
 
All the nights I spend fighting bad thoughts in my room
Feeling so alone, might as well be on the moon
I thought I found the antidote with you
I thought I found the antidote with you
 
But my head is full of poison
And my heart is full of doubt
I got toxins in my bloodstream
You tried hard to suck them out
And it feels like medication
And it’s good for me I’m sure
But it don’t matter how your love feels anymore
It’ll never be the cure
It’ll never be the cure
 
Used to play a game in my head
When I’d date a guy
Tally up the girls that he fucked
‘Til I start to cry
I thought I found the antidote this time
I thought I found the antidote this time
 
But I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
 
And my head is full of poison
And my heart is full of doubt
I got toxins in my bloodstream
You tried hard to suck them out
And it feels like medication
And it’s good for me I’m sure
But it don’t matter how your love feels anymore
It’ll never be the cure
It’ll never be the cure
 
Ohh
‘Cause baby I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
 
Why can’t you come stitch me up?
Why can’t it ever be enough?
Why can’t you come stitch me up?
Why can’t it ever be enough?
It’s not enough
 
Oh because my head is full of poison
And my heart is full of doubt
I got toxins in my bloodstream
You tried so hard to suck out
And it feels like medication
And it’s good for me I’m sure
But it don’t matter how your love feels anymore
It’ll never be the cure
It’ll never be the cure
It’ll never be

snippet.title: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War IV - Release Date & Post-Launch Roadmap Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
PRE-ORDER NOW on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2272360

Just announced at Warhammer Skulls 2026, Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War IV launches on September 17th, 2026!

Join us as we break down everything you need to know, from release date and pre-orders to the different game editions available, plus a look ahead at the exciting content coming your way in our Year One Expansion Roadmap.

Alongside two paid DLCs, The Blood Ravens Story Prologue and AFTERMATH, you can also expect a range of free post-launch content updates, including the return of fan-favourite Crusade mode later this year! 

The Commander Edition includes:
- 3-day early unlock (play starting September 14th)
- The Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War IV Digital soundtrack
- Access to both upcoming paid DLCs (The Blood Ravens Story Prologue and AFTERMATH)

Pre-orders are now live with a special 10% discount on both the Standard and Commander Editions, so be sure to secure your copy: 
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2272360

See all the Skulls 2026 reveals on Warhammer Community: https://www.warhammer-community.com/en-gb/articles/2eknkrto/skulls-2026-the-warhammer-video-games-festival/

Follow for more Warhammer, more often:

- Sign up for Warhammer+: https://www.warhammerplus.com/
- Warhammer 40,000 on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@OfficialWarhammer40000
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/warhammerofficial/
- Threads: https://www.threads.net/@warhammerofficial
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/WarhammerOfficial/
- Warhammer Community: https://www.warhammer-community.com/
- Get Warhammer in your inbox: https://ow.ly/6SJq50T3NL1"

snippet.title: GTA 6 : ENFIN des BONNES NOUVELLES OFFICIELLES 😍 Date de sortie, Précommandes, Marketing, Best Buy
snippet.description:
Une pluie de bonnes nouvelles tombent autour de GTA 6 ! Take-Two vient en effet de publier ses résultats financiers, et derrière les chiffres impressionnants, une chose saute aux yeux : Rockstar Games est plus puissant que jamais. Red Dead Redemption 2 devient officiellement le 3ème jeu le plus vendu de l’histoire, tandis que GTA V continue son parcours hallucinant.

Mais évidemment, tous les regards sont tournés vers GTA 6 ! Strauss Zelnick a de nouveau confirmé la date de sortie du 19 novembre 2026, évoqué le début de la campagne marketing cet été, répondu aux rumeurs Best Buy sur les précommandes, et donné quelques indices sur la stratégie de communication à venir. Une campagne massive, mais différente de celle de GTA V, plus adaptée à l’époque actuelle.

Alors, GTA 6 est-il désormais lancé sur ses rails ? Le report est-il définitivement derrière nous ? Je vous en parle !

snippet.title: TV Royale | EVO Princess, HERO Tombstone, NEW Game Mode, and MORE!
snippet.description:
Check the Patch Notes: https://supr.cl/Update_June26

Coming with the update:
🃏 Collection Levels
💎 Mastery Rework

Over the next season:
❄️ EVO Princess
💀 HERO Tombstone
👑 Princess Gambit
🏟️ Seasonal Arenas
🩷 Victory Run Event

X ► https://twitter.com/ClashRoyale/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashroyale
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashroyale
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashRoyale/

ENTER THE ARENA
Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles. From the creators of CLASH OF CLANS comes a real-time multiplayer battle game starring your favourite Clash characters and more. Start battling against players from around the world!

BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY AND DECK BUILDING
Choose unique Cards to your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for Battle!
Place your Cards right and knock down the enemy King and Tower Troops from their Towers in a strategic and fast-paced match.

COLLECT AND UPGRADE 100+ CARDS
Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ Cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defences you know and love and many others. Win battles and progress to new Arenas to unlock powerful new Cards to your collection!

BATTLE YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Battle your way to the League and Global Tournaments to match against the best players in the world.
Compete for glory and rewards!

SEASONAL EVENTS
Unlock new Seasonal items like Tower Skins, Emotes and powerful Magic Items with the Season Pass and participate in fun Challenges that put your skills to the test!

JOIN A CLAN AND GO TO WAR
Join or form a Clan with other players to share Cards and battle in Clan Wars for BIG rewards!

See you in the Arena!
#ClashRoyale

Paroles : 

Peu importe
Si le chien des voisins

Wow ho ho ho
Peu importe

Que toi t’appelles les flics
Wow ho ho ho

Si t’envies la vie des autres
Les autres envient la tienne
Wow po po pow
Peu importe
Les choix, les avis des autres
Toutes les vies valent la peine
Wow po po pow

Peu importe
Si l’monde marche à l’envers
Qu’les hommes aient le cœur à la guerre
Qu’y ait la guerre à nos portes
Pourquoi viser si loin
Quand poussent dans nos jardins
Des fleurs qu’on n’a pas vues,
Dis-moi,
Qu’est-ce que les autres ont de plus ?

Peu importe
Si t’envies la vie des autres
Les autres envient la tienne
Wow po po pow
Peu importe
Les choix, les avis des autres
Toutes les vies valent la peine
Wow po po pow

Qui aboie, comme ça, pour rien
Wow po po pow
Pas ma faute
Si, comme lui, j’aimerais bien
Qu’l’amour gagne du terrain
Wow po po pow
Qu’l’amour gagne du terrain
Enfin… j’dis ça, j’dis rien
Peu importe…

snippet.title: Qui a le MEILLEUR COMBO de SKINS sur Valorant ? (Dress To Impress version Valorant)
snippet.description:
⚡️ Jouez à OneState : https://tinyurl.com/RojinFuziah-OneState-May et utilisez le code ROFU pour obtenir 10 000 $ immédiatement sur la boutique en ligne et 60 000 $ de bonus débloqués dans le jeu après avoir atteint le niveau 8 !

Aujourd’hui, on (Rojin et Fuziah) délaisse le mode Compétitif pour un défi beaucoup plus sérieux : le DRESS TO IMPRESS version VALORANT ! 👗🔥

👉 Le but ? Créer le combo de skins le plus stylé du jeu.
👉 Le jury ? Nous. Et on ne va pas faire de cadeaux.

Oui, on a testé vos goûts, vos combos de Vandal, Phantom et couteaux... et certains devraient vraiment se poser des questions sur leur inventaire. 😭

Entre les skins ultra rares, les agents assortis et les finishers légendaires... qui va remporter le titre du joueur le plus stylé ?

Le concept :
➤ On juge les combos de skins (Vandal, Phantom, Ghost, Couteau)
➤ On attribue une note sur 10 à chaque "fit" d'agent
➤ Des associations incroyables... et d'autres totalement ratées ❌
➤ Un affrontement final pour le meilleur combo du lobby ! ⚔️

Est-ce que le skin le plus cher gagne forcément ?
Ou est-ce qu'un Battle Pass bien assorti peut battre une Kuronami ou une Reaver ? 😳
